title: Social Media in a Box — client config (the single state spine)
description: The ONE state record every module shares (PRD 4.1). All fields are sourced from the CLIENT's OWN accounts. Secrets are referenced from the client's environment stores, NEVER stored in skill files and NEVER printed (confirm SET, never echo the value). Client runtime uses CLIENT providers ONLY — never Anthropic.

brandName.description: The client's brand name; used for the brand-slug in deliverable labels and the planner sheet name.

pit.description: The client's GHL (Convert & Flow) Private Integration Token. Referenced from the client's env store; validated against GET /locations/{locationId}. Never printed.

locationId.description: The client's GHL locationId. Posting targets THIS location only.

userId.description: The client's GHL userId (author of scheduled posts).

openrouterKey.description: The client's OpenRouter key (sk-or-v1-...). Referenced from env; never printed.

openrouterModel.description: The client's CHOSEN primary text model id (NEVER an anthropic/claude-* id). Sovereign — never substituted.

openrouterFallbacks.description: Exactly 2 fallback model ids passed via OpenRouter route:"fallback". None may be an anthropic/claude-* id.

kieKey.description: The client's Kie.ai key (media generation). Referenced from env; never printed.

geminiKey.description: The client's Google Gemini key (vision QC / grid judge). Referenced from env; never printed.

plannerSheetId.description: The client's content-calendar Google Sheet id (their own Google credentials). Optional until first plan run.

brandInfo.description: The client's brand document (voice, offers, audience).

themeOfWeek.description: The current weekly theme (synced by the planner module; replaces the Clients_BCEO n8n data table).

platforms.description: Client's GHL-connected platforms. 'twitter' (C1) posts through the client's own GHL X channel via their PIT; parity with Skill 35. P0 live discovery (C2) reconciles this enum against the live GHL connected-accounts listing (AF-SM-DISCOVERY-DRIFT; both drift directions fail-closed).

platformsExcluded.description: C2: the LOGGED deliberate-exclusion list. A live-connected platform missing from `platforms` BLOCKS the run (the BANNED silent-miss) UNLESS the client's explicit choice to skip it is recorded here — the client's choice is FINAL, and visible, never silent.

status.description: Client status; preflight blocks unless == Paid.

slackId.description: Optional operator notification channel/target for fail/timeout alerts (parameterized, optional).

approvalGate.description: Human-approval gate; default none = QC-bot-only autonomy (PRD D4).

ctaLink.description: The weekly action link appended programmatically to followUpComments.

mode.description: single-brand ships fleet-wide; agency is operator/master boxes ONLY and requires a roster file. Agency hard-fails if two roster entries share a pit or locationId.

rosterFile.description: agency mode only: path to the roster of per-brand full credential sets. Absent in the shipped single-brand default.

backend.description: GHL-direct is primary (PRD D1); n8n-webhook is a transition adapter behind this flag, retired per-client. v0.2.0 default flipped to ghl-direct fleet-wide (merge plan C14/§5.4).

properties.$creative_note: v0.2.0 CREATIVE LAYER (merge plan §4 / CREATIVE-INTERJECTION-DESIGN). ALL fields below are OPTIONAL; their absence reproduces v0.1.0 behavior byte-for-byte. Provers freeze the FRAME (shape/size/count/safety), never the PICTURE (topic/angle/voice). A client-exact number is NEVER floored or capped and is recorded on the certificate creative block (AF-SM-OVERRIDE-UNLOGGED refuses a silent deviation).

themeQueue.description: I2: ordered list of owner-authored future themes. Resolution P1: owner answer > queue head > wildcard pick > evergreen. Non-empty check only; never read for content.

wildcard.description: I2: 'surprise me' - seeded-deterministic pick from themeQueue by week number (reproducible).

platformVoice.description: I8: per-platform voice/persona deltas, e.g. {"linkedin":"boardroom voice","tiktok":"chaos-goblin"}. Free text; never banded (same frame, different picture).

artDirection.description: I9: aesthetic / references / banned imagery / mood document. Free text; image-prompt LENGTH bands only, never a taste gate.

brandColors.description: I9: brand color hexes for image prompts. Unproven creative payload.

brandFonts.description: I9: brand fonts for image prompts. Unproven creative payload.

stylePick.description: I9: overrides the theme-seeded deterministic style pick from the 15-style artistic library. Logged on the certificate.

bandOverrides.description: R1/R5: CONFIG-LEVEL (persistent) band overrides keyed by band name (e.g. {"caption_fb_ig":[800,800]}). Resolution order run > config > default. Every applied override is logged or AF-SM-OVERRIDE-UNLOGGED refuses the certificate. Client-exact; never floored/capped.

hashtagPolicy.description: R3: per-platform hashtag count override incl [0,0] (e.g. {"linkedin":[0,0]}). Default bands unchanged; a stated policy is logged.

emDashPolicy.description: R4/DNA-3: em-dash split. Machine-reinjected JSON-safe fields (QC/grid) keep the ban FOREVER (technical). 'allow-content' opts CONTENT fields (posts/captions/comments) out of the ban, logged per-client on the certificate.

seriesLength.description: R7/I11: day count of the series (default 7). Non-7 is a logged client-exact override; evaluate_series already iterates N.

arcTemplate.description: I11/DNA-2: narrative arc. Default reproduces 35's TV season. Arc SHAPE is never proven (no arc prover); the knob is logged.

pitchCurve.description: I11: per-day pitch intensity numbers ('no pitch until Day 7' is a brief, not a violation). Never proven.

nextSeasonTease.description: I11: Day-N finale next-season tease on/off. Prompt-encoded; never proven.

personaSource.description: C10/I10/DNA-1: source of the week's persona. 'config' = free-text baseline (day one). 'adapter' = the Skill-22 persona INPUT adapter (F4.3, scripts/persona_adapter.py -> shared-utils/persona_for_job.py canonical 5-layer selection, LOGGED). 'client-choice' = the client's expressly-named persona (config key personaId/clientPersonaId/persona), which is FINAL, never judged, never overridden. Logged on the certificate.

properties.$fold_note: v0.2.0 FOLD toggles (merge plan C3-C7). All OPTIONAL and default OFF; a box that does not set them runs exactly like v0.1.0. When set true (or configured), the umbrella 'week' mode fans the extra out as a chained phase, and each is also its own standalone mode.

newsletter.description: C4: enable the weekly social-week digest email via GHL Campaigns (Tue 9 AM client-timezone).

blog.description: C5: enable the Day-7 long-form blog via GHL blog / LeadConnector (blogs.write).

podcast.description: C3: enable the weekly audio episode (Fish-Audio S2 -> ffprobe duration/bitrate bands -> Podbean + 1400x1400 cover). Unconfigured Fish-Audio/Podbean = PODCAST_DEFERRED labeled skip, never a failure.

engage.description: C6: enable the read-only 7-day engagement/anomaly report to notifyChannel (never blocks a publish run).

fishAudioKey.description: C3: the client's own Fish-Audio key (podcast TTS). Referenced from env; never printed. Absent -> PODCAST_DEFERRED.

podbeanApi.description: C3: the client's Podbean transport target (local Podbean API call, no n8n; Q5 default). Absent -> PODCAST_DEFERRED.

reposToken.description: §4.4: a LOGGED owner-approved re-post token to publish content a de-dup fingerprint would otherwise block (AF-SM-DOUBLE-POST). The client CAN re-post identically by saying so, loggedly; the engine never does it by accident.

dedupLookbackDays.description: QC11: content-fingerprint lookback window for AF-SM-DOUBLE-POST (default 90 days; in-week slot check regardless).

properties.$defer_note: v0.2.0 DEFER triggers (merge plan C8/C10/C11). Setting one requests a capability deferred to a NAMED later version: the orchestrator fails CLOSED with a clear 'deferred to vX.Y.Z' message (AF-SM-DEFERRED) BEFORE any phase runs — never a silent no-op. Defaults (off) reproduce today's behavior exactly.

narratedVideo.description: C8: request the narrated Reels lane (55-60s multi-clip + Fish-Audio voiceover + FFmpeg concat) — DEFERRED to v0.3.0; fails closed via defer_stub. The Sora 25.0s lane (`--mode video`) works today.

memoryFeed.description: C11: request the Skill-31 memory-core 'Dreaming' performance-insight feed — DEFERRED to v0.5.0; fails closed via defer_stub. The theme-of-week log half is already folded (P1 themeOfWeek in this spine).
